reasoning: Silhouette reads clearly as a rounded gem/crystal at 1x — the oval capsule shape is immediately legible. On dark backgrounds, the rich green body contrasts well with strong visibility. On the light/cream background the green body still reads, but the tan-beige base/shadow merges with the background, softening the bottom edge. Pixel edges at 4x are clean with readable highlight pixels giving a subtle sparkle. Charm is present — the soft rounded shape and jewel-green palette are friendly and toy-like — but personality is muted; it is a pleasant gem without a standout feature that would make it memorable or sticker-worthy. Scores above the fail threshold on silhouette clarity and dark-bg contrast, held back from pass by the light-bg base contrast weakness and modest charm ceiling.
